text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad I was able to place reasonably high, but
I'll admit I'm not quite satisfied...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I must accept my limits as of now and use this
result as motivation moving forward.
choice_data_list: Push through to the top next time.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I must accept my limits as of now and use this
result as motivation moving forward.
choice_data_list: Push through to the top next time.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I set out to give it my all, and I believe I managed
to do just that.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
To fail despite those efforts is an indication that I
am lacking something.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But I will not dwell on this more than necessary.
Instead, I must press forward with my eyes on the
next target.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My goal is the peak that lies at this path's end.
These results merely show that I have yet to arrive
there.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Steadily and calmly, we must build on what we
have achieved. Let us better ourselves race by
race, Trainer.
